title: Questions mount for Hegseth over possible US involvement in strike on Iranian school
summary_full: Democrats have written to ask the defence secretary whether the US was responsible, but he says the issue is being investigated.
summary_public: Democrats have written to ask the defence secretary whether the US was responsible, but he says the issue is being investigated.
